name: Walnut Sauce from Garlic Country
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the egg tagliarini according to package directions for about 9 minutes, or until al dente.
2. While the pasta is cooking, blend the walnut meats with enough hot tagliarini water in a blender until a paste forms.
3. Add garlic, butter, olive oil, and Parmesan cheese to the blended mixture. Blend again, adding more hot water as needed to achieve the desired consistency.
4. Once the pasta is cooked, drain it and pour the sauce over the top. Toss the pasta until well coated with the sauce.
5. Serve hot, and sprinkle additional grated Parmesan cheese on top if desired.
